title: elaphoglossum macrostandleyi
intro: Elaphoglossum macrostandleyi is a species of epiphytic fern, a type of plant that grows on other plants or surfaces, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Elaphoglossum macrostandleyi has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion. The herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum macrostandleyi typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or topical applications.
